nasb.text: So David and his men went on the way; and Shimei went along on the hillside parallel with him and as he went he cursed and cast stones and threw dust at him.

esv.text: So David and his men went on the road, while Shimei went along on the hillside opposite him and cursed as he went and threw stones at him and flung dust.

cnv.text: 於是大衛和跟從他的人繼續在大路上往前去。示每也沿著山坡，與大衛並排而行，一邊走，一邊咒罵，又用石頭投擲他，拿塵土揚他。

ccb.text: 于是，大卫和随从继续赶路，示每也沿着对面的山坡边走边骂，向他们扔石头，撒灰尘。
